The Process

How It Works

Four clear steps from first conversation to payment. No confusion, no surprises.

1

Step One

Valuation

Heavy Line performs a full asset valuation and presents a consignment contract — negotiated and signed before anything moves.

2

Step Two

Marketing & Sale

Listed, researched, and enhanced by AI. Multi-channel exposure, exclusive buyer database, and a dedicated sales team working the deal.

3

Step Three

Logistics

Upon completion of sale, the purchaser assumes full responsibility for asset retrieval using their own transport or our recommended logistics partners.

4

Step Four

Payment

Payment issued 30 days after delivery. Simple, predictable, professional. This is what sellers remember.

Who We Work With

Industries We Serve

From large-scale construction to mining operations — Heavy Line sources and moves specialized equipment across the industries that build the world.

Commercial Construction
Excavators, cranes, and site equipment for contractors of all scales.
Residential Development
Compact and mid-size equipment for builders and developers.
Mining & Aggregate
High-capacity specialized equipment for mining operations worldwide.
Road & Highway
Graders, compactors, and pavers for infrastructure contractors.
Demolition & Site Dev
Demolition attachments, shears, and site preparation equipment.

Why Heavy Line

Built on Reputation.

"Our reputation for sourcing quality equipment quickly is what closes deals — not ads."

Heavy Line Asset Group was founded on a simple principle: the heavy equipment market runs on trust. Buyers need to know the equipment is exactly what it says it is. Sellers need to know their asset will move quickly, at fair value, with zero headaches.

With over two decades in the industry, the Heavy Line team has built the network, the instincts, and the process to make both sides of that equation work — consistently, worldwide.

Consign With Heavy Line →
Quality
Every piece of equipment meets rigorous standards before it's listed. Buyers get what the listing says — every time.
Transparency
Clear communication at every step. No surprises in pricing, condition, or timelines.
Exceptional Service
From first inquiry to deal close, every transaction is handled by people who know this industry.
Worldwide
Active across North America and expanding globally — connecting the right buyers and sellers wherever they are.
